route_stop_data.position_units: route miles from each leg.from city toward leg.to city
route_stop_data.strategy: Offline curated dataset from public DOT rest-area pages, operator location pages, operator locator APIs, and development-time map review. Runtime play never calls external route or amenity services.
route_stop_data.license_notes: OpenStreetMap-derived future imports require ODbL attribution/share-alike review. Current route data keeps source notes per stop and favors public agency/operator pages.
